headline: These 3 highly successful CEOs have 1 soft skill in common—it shows up in different ways: ‘I just think it’s a good process’
summary: Lowe's CEO Marvin Ellison, YouTube CEO Neal Mohan and billionaire businessman Barry Diller credit much of their success to different forms of listening skills.

headline: Disney embarks on new chapter as Josh D'Amaro takes over as CEO
summary: Bob Iger is stepping aside as Josh D'Amaro, who previously served as chairman of Disney's experiences division, takes over as CEO.
